label: Bond Trend
description: Time-series momentum on bond ETFs: v2 canonical = top 25% by 3m momentum, rebalanced every 2 months, across bonds_us (7 tickers) + bonds_intl (EMB, BNDX). v1 proxy version: 12m momentum long/flat.
reference: Moskowitz, Ooi & Pedersen (2012), 'Time Series Momentum' — applied to bond ETFs
